nasb.text: The people who were sitting in darkness saw a great Light, And those who were sitting in the land and shadow of death, Upon them a Light dawned.”

esv.text: the people dwelling in darkness have seen a great light, and for those dwelling in the region and shadow of death, on them a light has dawned.”

cnv.text: 住在黑暗中的人民， 看見了大光； 死亡幽暗之地的居民， 有光照亮他們。”

ccb.text: 你们住在黑暗中的人看见了大光， 活在死亡阴影下的人被光照亮了！”

csbs.text: 那坐在黑暗中的民众 看到了大光； 那坐在死亡之地和死亡阴影中的人们， 曙光为他们升起。”
